title: Phase 0: Project scaffold & tooling
description: Set up the foundational project structure: pyproject.toml, .gitignore, .env.example, Makefile, package directory structure (axiom/, tests/, agents/, tasks/, trajectories/, scripts/). Configure ruff, mypy strict, pytest-asyncio. This is the first impression — when a Deeptune engineer clones the repo, they should immediately see professional tooling.
